texto: We “talk” relationship but we “live” religion, with unsatisfying results. Christianity defines itself, first and foremost, as a relationship with God. Even though this is true, our human nature tends toward living a relationship with God as if it were a religion
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mark Cowper-Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “We “talk” relationship but we “live” religion, with unsatisfying results. Christianity defines it…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, grace, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e love.
